headline: Block (NYSE:XYZ) Agrees $45 Million Cash App Fraud Settlement Across 46 States
summary: Block, trading as NYSE:XYZ, has agreed to pay $45 million to settle allegations from 46 US states that its Cash App failed to adequately protect users from fraud. The settlement requires Block to upgrade fraud prevention controls, provide live customer support, and revise certain Cash App advertising practices. These measures are expected to reshape how Cash App handles user complaints, dispute resolution, and transparency around security features. For investors watching Block, the $77.42...
